member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder
member.summary: Provides utility methods for building and managing SQL command parameters.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder.AddParameter(System.Data.Common.DbCommand,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds an input parameter to the specified database command.
member.param: The database command to add the parameter to.
The parameter name, with or without the '@' prefix.
The parameter value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder.AddOutputParameter(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand,System.String,System.Data.SqlDbType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds an output parameter to the specified SQL command.
member.param: The SQL command to add the parameter to.
The parameter name.
The SQL database type of the parameter.
The maximum size of the parameter data.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder.GetParameter(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value of a parameter from the specified SQL command.
member.param: The SQL command containing the parameter.
The name of the parameter to retrieve.
member.returns: The value of the specified parameter.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration
member.summary: Provides methods for registering EF Core entity types with the SQL Server model builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.GetPrimaryKeyType(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the primary key type for an entity that inherits from BaseEntity
Registers auditable entities with the ModelBuilder, applying base configurations, custom schema/table names, and optional specific entity configurations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.IsAssignableToGenericType(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Helper method to check if a type is assignable to a generic type definition

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with default conventions and base configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithSchemas(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String}[])
member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schemas for specified types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithNames(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String,System.String}[])
member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schema and/or table names for specified types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithCustomConfigurations(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Type,System.Type},System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with specific custom configurations.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1
member.summary: Base EF Core entity type configuration for auditable SQL Server entities.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Applies base configuration including keys, timestamps, status fields, user tracking, and indexes.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigurePrimaryKey(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the primary key and value generation strategy.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureTimestamps(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures timestamp columns for creation, update, and deletion tracking.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureStatusFields(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures soft-delete and activity status columns.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureExternalUserTracking(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures external user-tracking columns (CreatedBy, UpdatedBy, DeletedBy).
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureSoftDeleteAndIndexes(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Applies the global soft-delete query filter and configures database indexes.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureIndexes(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures database indexes for common query patterns.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.EntityTypeConfiguration`1
member.summary: Base configuration for non-auditable entities.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.EntityTypeConfiguration`1.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the primary key for the entity.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration
member.summary: Provides methods for registering simple (non-auditable) EF Core entity types with the SQL Server model builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.GetPrimaryKeyType(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the primary key type for an entity that inherits from Entity<TKey>
Registers non-auditable entities with the ModelBuilder, applying base configurations, custom schema/table names, and optional specific entity configurations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.HasIdProperty(System.Type)
member.summary: Helper method to check if a type has an Id property (for simple entities)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.GetIdPropertyType(System.Type)
member.summary: Helper method to get the type of the Id property

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.RegisterEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with default conventions and base configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithSchemas(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String}[])
member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schemas for specified types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithNames(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String,System.String}[])
member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schema and/or table names for specified types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithCustomConfigurations(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Type,System.Type},System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with specific custom configurations.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityTypeConfiguration`1
member.summary: Base configuration for simple entities that don't inherit from BaseEntity.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Configurations.SimpleEntityTypeConfiguration`1.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the primary key and identity column for the simple entity.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.SqlServerModelBuilderOptions
member.summary: Options that control SQL Server-specific model builder behaviour.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.SqlServerModelBuilderOptions.EnableDecimalConversion
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether decimal precision/scale conversion is applied. Defaults to true.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.SqlServerModelBuilderOptions.EnableNonUnicodeStrings
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether string properties are mapped as non-Unicode. Defaults to true.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext
member.summary: Base EF Core database context for SQL Server with support for domain events, timestamp auditing, and soft deletes.
member.remarks: Audit identity fields (CreatedBy, CreatedByUserId, UpdatedBy, UpdatedByUserId, DeletedBy, DeletedByUserId, IsMobileRequest) are populated automatically by , which is registered as a singleton by AddSqlServerPersistence. This context only manages timestamps (CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, DeletedAt) and the hard-delete → soft-delete conversion.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions)
member.summary: Base EF Core database context for SQL Server with support for domain events, timestamp auditing, and soft deletes.
member.remarks: Audit identity fields (CreatedBy, CreatedByUserId, UpdatedBy, UpdatedByUserId, DeletedBy, DeletedByUserId, IsMobileRequest) are populated automatically by , which is registered as a singleton by AddSqlServerPersistence. This context only manages timestamps (CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, DeletedAt) and the hard-delete → soft-delete conversion.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions,Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEventDispatcher)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with a domain event dispatcher.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.
The domain event dispatcher.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext.UpdateTimestamps
member.summary: Stamps CreatedAt on added entities and UpdatedAt on modified entities. User-identity fields are handled by .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext.HandleSoftDeletes
member.summary: Converts hard-deletes into soft-deletes and handles restore logic. User-identity fields on deletion (DeletedBy, DeletedByUserId) are handled by .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext.ConfigureDateTimeProperties(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Applies UTC-aware value converters to all and nullable DateTime properties.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Context.BaseContext.ApplySqlServerConfigurations(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Applies SQL Server-specific model configurations such as decimal precision and non-Unicode string mappings.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.DependencyInjection.SqlServerServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering SQL Server persistence services with the DI container.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.DependencyInjection.SqlServerServiceCollectionExtensions.EnsureResilienceOptionsRegistered(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Ensures PersistenceResilienceOptions is registered with default values. Called internally by persistence registration methods. To configure from appsettings.json, add this in your Startup/Program.cs: services.Configure<PersistenceResilienceOptions>(configuration.GetSection("Persistence:Resilience"));

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.DependencyInjection.SqlServerServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSqlServerPersistence``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder},System.Object)
member.summary: Registers a SQL Server DbContext and its corresponding UnitOfWork implementation, optionally with a service key using .NET 8+ keyed DI. Also registers IAdoRepository which is required by UnitOfWork.
member.param: The IServiceCollection.
The SQL Server-specific options for DbContext.
Optional key to register the services with (for keyed DI).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.DependencyInjection.SqlServerServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSqlServerDapperRepository(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object)
member.summary: Registers the Dapper repository for SQL Server with resilience policies. Can be used independently or alongside Entity Framework Core.
member.param: The IServiceCollection.
Optional key to register the service with (for keyed DI).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.DependencyInjection.SqlServerServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSqlServerAdoRepository(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object)
member.summary: Registers the ADO.NET repository for SQL Server with resilience policies. Can be used independently or alongside Entity Framework Core.
member.param: The IServiceCollection.
Optional key to register the service with (for keyed DI).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlExceptionTranslator
member.summary: Translates SQL Server exceptions into domain exceptions.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlExceptionTranslator.IsTransient(System.Exception)
member.summary: Determines whether the exception represents a transient SQL Server error.
member.param: The exception to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the error is transient and the operation can be retried.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlExceptionTranslator.Translate(System.Exception)
member.summary: Translates an exception into a .
member.param: The exception to translate.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlExceptionTranslator.FindSqlException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Recursively searches for SqlException in the exception chain

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlServerExceptionHandler
member.summary: Handles SQL Server exceptions by mapping them to domain error types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlServerExceptionHandler.IsTransientException(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException)
member.summary: Determines whether the exception represents a transient SQL Server error that can be retried.
member.param: The SQL exception to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the error is transient.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlServerExceptionHandler.MapSqlException(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException)
member.summary: Maps a to a domain error descriptor.
member.param: The SQL exception to map.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.SqlServerExceptionHandler.HandleSqlException(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs and throws a as a .
member.param: The SQL exception to handle.
The logger to write the error details to.
A description of the operation that failed.
The name of the calling member (auto-populated).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an error occurs within the UnitOfWork operations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Interceptors.AuditSaveChangesInterceptor
member.summary: A singleton EF Core interceptor that populates audit fields (CreatedBy, UpdatedBy, DeletedBy and their UserId counterparts) on every before changes are persisted.
member.remarks: Registered automatically by AddSqlServerPersistence. Resolves from a fresh DI scope on each save, so it is safe to use with AddDbContextPool (singleton-compatible).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Interceptors.AuditSaveChangesInterceptor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceScopeFactory)
member.summary: A singleton EF Core interceptor that populates audit fields (CreatedBy, UpdatedBy, DeletedBy and their UserId counterparts) on every before changes are persisted.
member.remarks: Registered automatically by AddSqlServerPersistence. Resolves from a fresh DI scope on each save, so it is safe to use with AddDbContextPool (singleton-compatible).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Mapping.DataTableNameMapper
member.summary: Provides utilities for assigning table names in a from a stored procedure output parameter.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Mapping.DataTableNameMapper.ProcessTableNames(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand,System.Data.DataSet)
member.summary: Assigns table names from the @tableNames command parameter to the corresponding tables in the .
member.param: The SQL command containing the @tableNames parameter.
The data set whose tables will be renamed.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper
member.summary: Provides extension methods for mapping results to strongly-typed objects.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper.ToListAsync``1(System.Data.Common.DbDataReader,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Maps a DbDataReader to a List of entities of type T with support for records and init-only properties

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper.ToList``1(System.Data.Common.DbDataReader)
member.summary: Synchronously maps all rows from the data reader to a list of .
member.typeparam: The target type to map each row to.
member.param: The data reader positioned before the first row.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper.MapToObject``1(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlDataReader)
member.summary: Maps a single row from a SqlDataReader to an object of type T using reflection.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository
member.summary: Provides ADO.NET data access operations with retry policy and optional transaction sharing. Enhanced with SQL Server error handling, domain error mapping, and flexible filter parameter strategies.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Lazy-loaded retry policy based on configuration.
Constructor for AdoRepository with resilience configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.SetTransaction(System.Data.Common.DbTransaction)
member.summary: Sets the current database transaction from the Unit of Work.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.SetConnection(System.Data.Common.DbConnection)
member.summary: Sets the current database connection from the Unit of Work.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.ClearTransaction
member.summary: Clears the current transaction and connection.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and maps results to a list of objects.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetDataSetAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and returns a DataSet.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.ExecuteNonQueryAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a non-query SQL command.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.QuerySingleOrDefaultAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query designed to return a single row.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryFirstOrDefaultAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and returns the first row or null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryAsyncEnumerable``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams query results as an async enumerable for memory-efficient processing.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a connection string from configuration, caching it for subsequent calls.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetOpenConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates and opens a new SqlConnection.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.CreateCommand(System.Data.Common.DbConnection,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Creates and configures a SqlCommand.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.ExecuteScalarAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a query and returns a single scalar value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if any rows exist for the given query.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.CountAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the count of rows for the given query.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.LongCountAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the long count of rows for the given query.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetPagedAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a paginated SQL query with automatic count query. Uses SQL Server OFFSET-FETCH with optimized query plans. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetPagedAsync``1(System.String,System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a paginated SQL query with custom count query. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetPagedFromStoredProcedureAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a paginated stored procedure. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetFilteredAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a filtered SQL query with sorting and search capabilities (non-paginated). Automatically builds parameters from FilterRequest and applies ORDER BY clause. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetFilteredFromStoredProcedureAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a filtered stored procedure (non-paginated). Passes filter criteria to the stored procedure without pagination parameters. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetFilteredDataSetAsync(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a filtered query and returns a DataSet (non-paginated). Useful for reports that need multiple result sets with filtering and sorting. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryMultipleAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes multiple queries in a single batch.
Executes multiple non-query commands in a batch.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BulkInsertAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk insert using SqlBulkCopy for optimal performance.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BulkInsertAsync(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk insert from DataTable using SqlBulkCopy.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilterParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds query parameters from FilterRequest using flexible strategy. Strategy is determined by CommandOptionsDto.UseJsonFilters flag. - UseJsonFilters = false (default): Individual parameters for raw SQL queries - UseJsonFilters = true: JSON serialized parameters for stored procedures

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilterParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds query parameters from PaginationRequest using flexible strategy. Strategy is determined by CommandOptionsDto.UseJsonFilters flag.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildStoredProcedureParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds stored procedure parameters from FilterRequest. Automatically uses JSON strategy for stored procedures unless explicitly overridden.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildStoredProcedureParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds stored procedure parameters from PaginationRequest. Automatically uses JSON strategy for stored procedures unless explicitly overridden.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildPaginationMetadata(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds pagination metadata for PagedResult.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilterMetadata(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds pagination metadata for FilterRequest (non-paginated).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilteredSql(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest)
member.summary: Builds filtered SQL with ORDER BY clause based on FilterRequest.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.AdoRepository.ValidateAndSanitizeSortColumn(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and sanitizes sort column names to prevent SQL injection (CWE-89). Uses a strict whitelist approach - only allows exact matches from a predefined set. Falls back to regex validation with comprehensive keyword blacklist.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.DapperRepository
member.summary: Dapper-based repository implementation for SQL Server. Provides simplified data access with automatic object mapping.
member.remarks:
This implementation uses Dapper for lightweight ORM functionality with:
Automatic type mapping
Retry policies with exponential backoff
Transaction support via Unit of Work
SQL Server-specific optimizations

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.DapperRepository.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Lazy-loaded retry policy based on configuration.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.DapperRepository.DefaultTimeout
member.summary: Gets the default command timeout from configuration.
Constructor for DapperRepository with resilience configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.DapperRepository.GetConnectionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a connection for the operation. Returns a tuple with the connection and whether it should be disposed. When using a shared connection (from UnitOfWork), it should NOT be disposed by the caller. When creating a new connection, it SHOULD be disposed by the caller.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.DapperRepository.ExecuteWithConnectionAsync``1(System.Func{System.Data.Common.DbConnection,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation with proper connection lifecycle management. Automatically handles connection disposal for owned connections only.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Repositories.DapperRepository.SafeColumnNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z_a-z].
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1
member.summary: Coordinates EF Core and ADO.NET operations within a single transactional unit of work.
member.typeparam: The EF Core database context type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.#ctor(`0,Acontplus.Core.Abstractions.Persistence.IAdoRepository,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork{`0}})
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: The EF Core database context.
The ADO.NET repository for raw database operations.
Optional logger instance.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.DiagnosticConfig
member.summary: Provides OpenTelemetry diagnostic configuration for the SQL Server repository layer.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.DiagnosticConfig.ActivitySource
member.summary: The used to create diagnostic tracing activities.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.SqlStringParam
member.summary: Provides utilities for sanitizing SQL string parameters to prevent SQL injection.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.SqlStringParam.Sanitize(System.String)
member.summary: Removes common SQL injection patterns from the input string by replacing them with spaces.
member.param: The raw input string to sanitize.
member.returns: The sanitized string with dangerous patterns replaced by spaces.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper
member.summary: Provides time zone conversion utilities for Ecuador and server local time.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.NowInEcuador
member.summary: Obtener la hora actual en Ecuador

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.NowInServer
member.summary: Obtener la hora actual del servidor

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.ToEcuadorTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: OPCIÓN 1 (RECOMENDADA): Convertir UTC a zona horaria específica

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.ToEcuadorTime(System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Converts a nullable UTC to Ecuador time, returning null if the input is null.
member.param: The nullable UTC date and time.
member.returns: The Ecuador local date and time, or null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.ToServerTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a UTC to the server's local time zone.
member.param: The UTC date and time to convert.
member.returns: The date and time in the server's local time zone.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.SqlServer.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.FromEcuadorTimeToUtc(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Convertir de zona horaria local a UTC (para guardar en BD)

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the SafeColumnNameRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiWordChars
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
